ast.source: This text will be used for the section heading. Can be left blank.

ast.source: If present, the block will have a horizontal rule placed after it.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 此组容器内的所有嵌套元素都将接收此 CSS 类。如果留空，则不会应用任何类。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Disable this to prevent adding the property to the containing HTML element as a CSS class. This can be used to avoid collisions with native Obsidian CSS.
ast.target: 禁用此项可防止将属性作为 CSS 类添加到包含的 HTML 元素中。这可用于避免与 Obsidian 原生 CSS 冲突。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 如果不存在，将显示此文本。

ast.source: The plugin will attempt to add dice rollers as specified.
ast.target: 插件将尝试按指定添加骰子滚动器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The dice roller will parse this property instead of the original.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The heading will use this size.
ast.target: 标题将使用此大小。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: desc
ast.source: +10 to hit
ast.target: +10 命中

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 邪神鱼人可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a creature communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires if the aboleth can see the creature.
ast.target: 如果一个生物通过心灵感应与邪神鱼人交流，且邪神鱼人能看到该生物，邪神鱼人就会得知该生物最强烈的欲望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth makes three tentacle attacks.
ast.target: 邪神鱼人进行三次触手攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft. one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：15 (3d6 + 5) 钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
ast.target: 邪神鱼人进行一次感知（察觉）检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth makes one tail attack.
ast.target: 邪神鱼人进行一次尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One creature charmed by the aboleth takes 10 (3d6) psychic damage, and the aboleth regains hit points equal to the damage the creature takes.
ast.target: 一个被邪神鱼人魅惑的生物受到 10 (3d6) 心灵伤害，邪神鱼人恢复等同于该生物所受伤害的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+2 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：2 (1d4) 钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 龙可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 如果龙豁免失败，它可以选择改为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 龙可以使用其威吓存在。然后它进行三次攻击：一次用咬，两次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：17 (2d10 + 6) 穿刺伤害外加 4 (1d8) 酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：13 (2d6 + 6) 挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 15 英尺，单一目标。命中：15 (2d8 + 6) 钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales acid in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙喷吐酸液，形成一条60尺长、5宽的线状区域。区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 18的敏捷豁免，豁免失败将受到54（12d8）点酸蚀伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
ast.target: 巨龙进行一次感知（察觉）检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon makes a tail attack.
ast.target: 巨龙进行一次尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 ft. of the dragon must succeed on a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw or take 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.
ast.target: 巨龙拍击双翼。巨龙周围10尺内的每个生物必须成功通过一次DC 19的敏捷豁免，否则将受到13（2d6 + 6）点钝击伤害并被击倒。随后巨龙可以飞行至多其飞行速度一半的距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the dracolich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 如果龙巫妖豁免失败，它可以选择改为豁免成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 龙巫妖对法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 龙巫妖可以使用其威吓光环。然后它进行三次攻击：一次撕咬和两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：18（2d10 + 7）点穿刺伤害外加5（1d10）点闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d6 + 7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d8 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich exhales lightning in a 90-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙巫妖喷吐闪电，形成一条90尺长、5宽的线状区域。区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 20的敏捷豁免，豁免失败将受到66（12d10）点闪电伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
ast.target: 龙巫妖进行一次感知（察觉）检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich makes a tail attack.
ast.target: 龙巫妖进行一次尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich beats its tattered wings. Each creature within 10 ft. of the dracolich must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 14 (2d6 + 7) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. After beating its wings this way, the dracolich can fly up to half its flying speed.
ast.target: 龙巫妖拍击其破败的双翼。龙巫妖周围10尺内的每个生物必须成功通过一次DC 21的敏捷豁免，否则将受到14（2d6 + 7）点钝击伤害并被击倒。以这种方式拍击双翼后，龙巫妖可以飞行至多其飞行速度一半的距离。

ast.source: The dragon can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra moment.
ast.target: 巨龙可以在冰面和雪地上移动和攀爬，无需进行能力检定。此外，由冰或雪构成的困难地形不会使其额外消耗移动力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.
ast.target: 斯芬克斯免疫任何感知其情绪或读取其思想的效果，以及它拒绝的任何预言法术。用于确定斯芬克斯意图或诚意的感知（洞察）检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 斯芬克斯的武器攻击是魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sphinx makes two claw attacks.
ast.target: 斯芬克斯进行两次爪击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d10 + 6）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sphinx makes one claw attack.
ast.target: 斯芬克斯进行一次爪击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sphinx magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 斯芬克斯施展魔法传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，传送至其可见的120尺内一个未被占据的空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sphinx casts a spell from its list of prepared spells, using a spell slot as normal.
ast.target: 斯芬克斯从其准备法术列表中施放一个法术，如常使用法术位。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The armor is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the armor must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.
ast.target: 该盔甲在反魔法力场区域内时处于失能状态。如果被解除魔法针对，盔甲必须成功通过一次对抗施法者法术豁免DC的体质豁免，否则将昏迷1分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the armor remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal suit of armor.
ast.target: 当盔甲保持静止不动时，它与一套普通盔甲无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The armor makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 盔甲进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ankheg spits acid in a line that is 30 ft. long and 5 ft. wide, provided that it has no creature grappled. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 穴居虫喷吐酸液，形成一条30尺长、5尺宽的线状区域，前提是它没有擒抱住任何生物。该线状区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 13的敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到10（3d6）点强酸伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ape makes two fist attacks.
ast.target: 猿进行两次拳击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 25/50 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程25/50尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The archmage has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 大法师在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺或射程20/60尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: During its first turn, the assassin has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn. Any hit the assassin scores against a surprised creature is a critical hit.
ast.target: 在刺客的第一个回合内，它对任何尚未行动的生物进行攻击检定时具有优势。刺客对措手不及的生物造成的任何命中都是重击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.
ast.target: 如果刺客受到一个允许其进行敏捷豁免以只承受一半伤害的效果影响，那么刺客在豁免成功时不承受伤害，豁免失败时只承受一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The assassin deals an extra 13 (4d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 ft. of an ally of the assassin that isn't incapacitated and the assassin doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.
ast.target: 当刺客使用武器攻击命中目标且攻击检定具有优势时，或者当目标位于刺客一名未失能的盟友5尺范围内且刺客的攻击检定没有劣势时，刺客额外造成13（4d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The assassin makes two shortsword attacks.
ast.target: 刺客进行两次短剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到24（7d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+6，射程80/320尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到24（7d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the shrub remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal shrub.
ast.target: 当灌木保持静止不动时，它与一丛普通灌木无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 — 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+1，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1（1d4 — 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the tree remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.
ast.target: 当树木保持静止不动时，它与一棵普通树木无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：14（3d6 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature that touches the azer or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage.
ast.target: 任何在5尺内触碰火矮人或用近战攻击命中它的生物会受到5（1d10）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the azer hits with a metal melee weapon, it deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 当火矮人用金属近战武器命中时，它额外造成3（1d6）点火焰伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The azer sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft..
ast.target: 火矮人在10尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在额外10尺范围内发出微光光照。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack, plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点钝击伤害，或如果双手持握进行近战攻击则为8（1d10 + 3）点钝击伤害，外加3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The baboon has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一名狒狒的盟友位于目标生物5尺范围内且该盟友未失能，那么狒狒对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 — 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+1，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1（1d4 — 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The badger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 獾在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of each of the balor's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage, and flammable objects in the aura that aren't being worn or carried ignite. A creature that touches the balor or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 在巴洛炎魔每回合开始时，其周围5英尺内的每个生物受到10（3d6）点火焰伤害，且光环内未被穿戴或携带的可燃物体会被点燃。一个生物若在5英尺内触碰巴洛炎魔或以近战攻击命中它，则受到10（3d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 巴洛炎魔对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 巴洛炎魔的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor makes two attacks: one with its longsword and one with its whip.
ast.target: 巴洛炎魔发动两次攻击：一次使用其长剑，一次使用其鞭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) lightning damage. If the balor scores a critical hit, it rolls damage dice three times, instead of twice.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+14，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：21（3d8 + 8）点挥砍伤害外加13（3d8）点闪电伤害。若巴洛炎魔造成重击，它将骰子掷三次，而非两次。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 25 feet toward the balor.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+14，触及30英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d6 + 8）点挥砍伤害外加10（3d6）点火焰伤害，且目标必须通过一次DC 20的力量豁免检定，否则将被拉向巴洛炎魔最多25英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 巴洛炎魔施展魔法传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，传送至其可见的、未被占据的空间，最远120英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 80 ft./320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+3，射程80英尺/320英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The captain makes three melee attacks: two with its scimitar and one with its dagger. Or the captain makes two ranged attacks with its daggers.
ast.target: 队长发动三次近战攻击：两次使用其弯刀，一次使用其匕首。或者队长发动两次远程攻击，使用其匕首。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The captain adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the captain must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 队长针对一次将命中它的近战攻击，将其AC提升2点。为此，队长必须能看见攻击者并手持近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of each of its turns, the barbed devil deals 5 (1d10) piercing damage to any creature grappling it.
ast.target: 在刺魔每回合开始时，它对任何正在擒抱它的生物造成5（1d10）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.
ast.target: 魔法黑暗不会阻碍该魔鬼的黑暗视觉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 该魔鬼对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three melee attacks: one with its tail and two with its claws. Alternatively, it can use Hurl Flame twice.
ast.target: 该魔鬼发动三次近战攻击：一次使用其尾巴，两次使用其爪子。或者，它可以使用两次“投掷火焰”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.
ast.target: 远程法术攻击：命中+5，射程150英尺，单一目标。命中：10（3d6）点火焰伤害。如果目标是一个未被穿戴或携带的可燃物体，它也会着火。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加7（2d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bat can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 蝙蝠在耳聋时无法使用其盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.
ast.target: 蝙蝠在依赖听觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+0，触及5英尺，一个生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil can't be frightened while it can see an allied creature within 30 feet of it.
ast.target: 只要该魔鬼能看到其30英尺内的一个盟友生物，它就不会被恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes two attacks: one with its beard and one with its glaive.
ast.target: 该魔鬼发动两次攻击：一次使用其胡须，一次使用其长柄刀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The behir makes two attacks: one with its bite and one to constrict.
ast.target: 贝希摩斯发动两次攻击：一次使用其咬击，一次使用其缠绕。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：22（3d10 + 6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 17 (2d10 + 6) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 16) if the behir isn't already constricting a creature, and the target is restrained until this grapple ends.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5英尺，一个大型或更小的生物。命中：17（2d10 + 6）点钝击伤害外加17（2d10 + 6）点挥砍伤害。如果贝希摩斯当前未缠绕任何生物，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 16），且目标在此擒抱结束前处于束缚状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The behir exhales a line of lightning that is 20 ft. long and 5 ft. wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 贝希摩斯喷出一道20英尺长、5英尺宽的闪电线。该线上的每个生物必须进行一次DC 16的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到66（12d10）点闪电伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the berserker can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在狂战士的回合开始时，它可以使其在该回合内所有近战武器攻击检定获得优势，但针对它的攻击检定在其下一回合开始前也具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d12 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 熊在依赖嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bear makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 熊发动两次攻击：一次使用其咬击，一次使用其爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10 + 2）点穿刺伤害外加2（1d4）点强酸伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales acid in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (Sd8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 该龙喷出一道15英尺长、5英尺宽的酸液线。该线上的每个生物必须进行一次DC 11的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到22（5d8）点强酸伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 该布丁可以通过窄至1英寸宽的空间而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 该布丁可以攀爬困难表面，包括天花板下方，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a pudding that is Medium or larger is subjected to lightning or slashing damage, it splits into two new puddings if it has at least 10 hit points. Each new pudding has hit points equal to half the original pudding's, rounded down. New puddings are one size smaller than the original pudding.
ast.target: 当一个中型或更大的布丁受到闪电或挥砍伤害时，如果它至少有10点生命值，它会分裂成两个新的布丁。每个新布丁的生命值等于原布丁生命值的一半（向下取整）。新布丁比原布丁小一个体型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 狗在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 40 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see. Before or after teleporting, the dog can make one bite attack.
ast.target: 该狗施展魔法传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，传送至其可见的、未被占据的空间，最远40英尺。在传送前或传送后，该狗可以发动一次咬击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hawk has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 鹰在依赖视觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hawk has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一个鹰的盟友在目标生物5英尺内且该盟友未失能，则鹰对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d10 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加3（1d6）点闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 该龙喷出一道30英尺长、5英尺宽的闪电线。该线上的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到22（4d10）点闪电伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a tusk attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 3 (1d6) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果野猪在同一直线上向目标移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合内以獠牙攻击命中目标，则目标额外受到3（1d6）点挥砍伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须通过一次DC 11的力量豁免检定，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar takes 7 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 如果野猪受到7点或更少的伤害，且该伤害会将其生命值降至0，则其生命值改为降至1。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6+1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its sting.
ast.target: 该恶魔进行三次攻击：两次使用爪击，一次使用尾刺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8+4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d10+3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the bugbear hits with it (included in the attack).
ast.target: 当熊地精使用近战武器命中时，该武器造成额外一骰伤害（已计入攻击）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the bugbear surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage from the attack.
ast.target: 如果熊地精在战斗第一轮中突袭一个生物并命中，则该目标受到来自该攻击的额外7（2d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d8+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage in melee or 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage at range.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺或射程30/120尺，单一目标。命中：近战时9（2d6+2）点穿刺伤害，远程时5（1d6+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bulette's long jump is up to 30 ft. and its high jump is up to 15 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 土龙的远跳距离可达30尺，高跳距离可达15尺，无论是否助跑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d12 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：30（4d12+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The carrion crawler has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 腐蛆怪在进行依赖嗅觉的感知（感知）检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The carrion crawler can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 腐蛆怪可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The carrion crawler makes two attacks: one with its tentacles and one with its bite.
ast.target: 腐蛆怪进行两次攻击：一次使用触手，一次使用啃咬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The cat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 猫在进行依赖嗅觉的感知（感知）检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+0，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d8+5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6+5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the centaur moves at least 30 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a pike attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 如果半人马在同一直线上向目标移动至少30尺，并在同一回合内用长戟攻击命中该目标，则该目标受到额外10（3d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The centaur makes two attacks: one with its pike and one with its hooves or two with its longbow.
ast.target: 半人马进行两次攻击：一次使用长戟，一次使用蹄击；或两次使用长弓。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d10+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程150/600尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes two attacks with its chains.
ast.target: 该恶魔使用锁链进行两次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if the devil isn't already grappling a creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点挥砍伤害。如果该恶魔未擒抱其他生物，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC14）。在擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，并在其每回合开始时受到7（2d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chimera makes three attacks: one with its bite, one with its horns, and one with its claws. When its fire breath is available, it can use the breath in place of its bite or horns.
ast.target: 奇美拉进行三次攻击：一次使用啃咬，一次使用犄角，一次使用爪击。当其火焰吐息可用时，可以用吐息代替啃咬或犄角攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d12+4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon head exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 31 (7d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙头在一个15尺锥形区域内喷出火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC15的敏捷豁免，失败则受到31（7d8）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chuul can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 章鱼怪可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chuul senses magic within 120 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn't itself magical.
ast.target: 章鱼怪可以随意感知其120尺内的魔法。此特性运作方式类似侦测魔法法术，但本身并非魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chuul makes two pincer attacks. If the chuul is grappling a creature, the chuul can also use its tentacles once.
ast.target: 章鱼怪进行两次钳击。如果章鱼怪正在擒抱一个生物，它还可以使用一次触手攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the chuul doesn't have two other creatures grappled.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点钝击伤害。如果目标是大型或更小的生物，且章鱼怪未擒抱其他两个生物，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC14）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One creature grappled by the chuul must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. Until this poison ends, the target is paralyzed. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 被章鱼怪擒抱的一个生物必须成功通过一次DC13的体质豁免，否则中毒1分钟。在中毒结束前，目标处于瘫痪状态。目标可以在其每回合结束时重复豁免，成功则结束自身该效应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever the golem is subjected to acid damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hit points equal to the acid damage dealt.
ast.target: 每当魔像受到酸液伤害时，它不受伤害，而是恢复等同于所受酸液伤害值的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.
ast.target: 魔像免疫任何会改变其形态的法术或效应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The golem has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 魔像在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The golem's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 魔像的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The golem makes two slam attacks.
ast.target: 魔像进行两次猛击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Until the end of its next turn, the golem magically gains a +2 bonus to its AC, has advantage on Dexterity saving throws, and can use its slam attack as a bonus action.
ast.target: 直到其下一回合结束，魔像获得魔法带来的+2护甲加值，在敏捷豁免中具有优势，并可以将猛击作为附赠动作使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While attached to a creature, the cloaker takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down). and that creature takes the other half.
ast.target: 当附着在一个生物身上时，披风怪只受到所受伤害的一半（向下取整），而该生物受到另一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the cloaker remains motionless without its underside exposed, it is indistinguishable from a dark leather cloak.
ast.target: 当披风怪保持静止且底面未暴露时，它与一件深色皮斗篷无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in bright light, the cloaker has disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在明亮光线下，披风怪在攻击检定和依赖视觉的感知（感知）检定中处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The cloaker makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail.
ast.target: 披风怪进行两次攻击：一次使用啃咬，一次使用尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，一个生物。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 巨人在依赖嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The giant's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma. It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect magic, fog cloud, light
3/day each: feather fall, fly, misty step, telekinesis
1/day each: control weather, gaseous form
ast.target:
巨人的天生施法属性是魅力。它可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意施放：侦测魔法、云雾术、光亮术
每日各3次：羽落术、飞行术、迷踪步、念动移物
每日各1次：操控天气、气化形体

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two morningstar attacks.
ast.target: 巨人进行两次晨星攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及10尺，一个目标。命中：21（3d8 + 8）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+12，射程60/240尺，一个目标。命中：30（4d10 + 8）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the snake can't constrict another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 14）。在擒抱结束前，该生物处于束缚状态，且巨蟒无法再擒抱另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The couatl's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 羽蛇的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The couatl is immune to scrying and to any effect that would sense its emotions, read its thoughts, or detect its location.
ast.target: 羽蛇免疫预言术以及任何能感知其情绪、读取其思想或侦测其位置的效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 24 hours. Until this poison ends, the target is unconscious. Another creature can use an action to shake the target awake.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：8（1d6 + 5）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 13的体质豁免，否则中毒24小时。在中毒期间，目标处于昏迷状态。另一个生物可以使用一个动作摇醒目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the couatl can't constrict another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，一个中型或更小的生物。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 15）。在擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，且羽蛇无法再缠绕另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The crab can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 螃蟹可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+0，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：1点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The crocodile can hold its breath for 15 minutes.
ast.target: 鳄鱼可以屏住呼吸15分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the crocodile can't bite another target
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：7（1d10 + 2）点穿刺伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 12）。在擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，且鳄鱼无法再撕咬另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fanatic has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.
ast.target: 狂热者在对抗魅惑或恐惧的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fanatic makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 狂热者进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺或射程20/60尺，一个生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The cultist has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.
ast.target: 邪教徒在对抗魅惑或恐惧的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The darkmantle can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 暗蝠在耳聋时无法使用其盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the darkmantle remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a cave formation such as a stalactite or stalagmite.
ast.target: 当暗蝠保持静止不动时，它与钟乳石或石笋等洞穴构造无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, or knocked unconscious.
ast.target: 獒犬在感知（感知）检定以及对抗致盲、魅惑、耳聋、恐惧、震慑或昏迷的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog makes two bite attacks.
ast.target: 獒犬进行两次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gnome has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 侏儒在岩石地形中进行的隐匿（敏捷）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gnome has advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.
ast.target: 侏儒在对抗魔法的智力、感知和魅力豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The gnome's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 11). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: nondetection (self only)
1/day each: blindness/deafness, blur, disguise self
ast.target: 侏儒的天生施法属性是智力（法术豁免DC 11）。它可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：\n随意施放：回避侦测（仅限自身）\n每日各1次：目盲/耳聋、朦胧术、易容术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：2（1d4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva's weapon attacks are magical. When the deva hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 神使的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。当神使用任何武器命中时，该武器额外造成4d8点光耀伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The deva's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). The deva can innately cast the following spells, requiring only verbal components:
At will: detect evil and good
1/day each: commune, raise dead
ast.target: 神使的施法属性是魅力（法术豁免DC 17）。神使可以天生施放以下法术，仅需言语成分：\n随意施放：侦测善恶\n每日各1次：通神术、死者复活

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 神使在对抗法术及其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 神使进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) radiant damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：7（1d6 + 4）点钝击伤害，外加18（4d8）点光耀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva touches another creature. The target magically regains 20 (4d8 + 2) hit points and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.
ast.target: 神使触碰另一个生物。目标神奇地恢复20（4d8 + 2）点生命值，并解除任何诅咒、疾病、中毒、目盲或耳聋状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 狼在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一名狼的盟友位于目标生物5尺范围内且该盟友未处于失能状态，狼对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须通过DC 13的力量豁免，否则被击倒在地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the djinni dies, its body disintegrates into a warm breeze, leaving behind only equipment the djinni was wearing or carrying.
ast.target: 如果巨灵死亡，其尸体会化为一阵温暖的微风消散，只留下它穿戴或携带的装备。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The djinni makes three scimitar attacks.
ast.target: 巨灵进行三次弯刀攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) lightning or thunder damage (djinni's choice).
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点挥砍伤害，外加3（1d6）点闪电或雷鸣伤害（巨灵选择）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 变形怪可以使用其动作变形为它见过的小型或中型类人生物，或变回其真实形态。除体型外，其各项属性在每种形态下都相同。它穿戴或携带的任何装备不会变形。如果它死亡，则会变回真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger has advantage on attack rolls against any creature it has surprised.
ast.target: 变形怪对任何它突袭的生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the doppelganger surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) damage from the attack.
ast.target: 如果变形怪突袭了一个生物，并在战斗第一轮中用攻击命中该目标，则该次攻击额外造成10（3d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 变形怪进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：7（1d6 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：9（2d4 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon turtle can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 龙龟可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon turtle makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws. It can make one tail attack in place of its two claw attacks.
ast.target: 龙龟进行三次攻击：一次用其啃咬，两次用其爪击。它可以用一次尾击代替两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (3d12 + 7) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：26（3d12 + 7）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d8 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d8 + 7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (3d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the dragon turtle and knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：26（3d12 + 7）点钝击伤害。若目标为生物，其必须通过一次DC 20的力量豁免，否则将被推离龙龟最多10尺并被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon turtle exhales scalding steam in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 52 (15d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Being underwater doesn't grant resistance against this damage.
ast.target: 龙龟在一个60尺锥形区域内喷出滚烫的蒸汽。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 18的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到52（15d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。处于水下并不能对此伤害获得抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dretch makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 怯魔进行两次攻击：一次使用其啮咬，一次使用其爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (2d4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（2d4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drider to sleep.
ast.target: 卓尔蛛化精灵在对抗魅惑的豁免中具有优势，且魔法无法使其入睡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The drider's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). The drider can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: dancing lights
1/day each: darkness, faerie fire
ast.target: 卓尔蛛化精灵的天生施法属性为感知（法术豁免DC 13）。卓尔蛛化精灵可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：\n随意施放：舞动光球\n每日各1次：黑暗术，妖火

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 卓尔蛛化精灵可以攀爬困难表面，包括在天花板上倒挂，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the drider has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下时，卓尔蛛化精灵在攻击检定以及依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.
ast.target: 卓尔蛛化精灵无视由蛛网造成的移动限制。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider makes three attacks, either with its longsword or its longbow. It can replace one of those attacks with a bite attack.
ast.target: 卓尔蛛化精灵进行三次攻击，使用其长剑或长弓。它可以将其中一次攻击替换为啮咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：2（1d4）点穿刺伤害外加9（2d8）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点挥砍伤害，若双手使用则为8（1d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+6，射程150/600尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加4（1d8）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drow has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.
ast.target: 卓尔精灵在对抗魅惑的豁免中具有优势，且魔法无法使其入睡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The drow's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 11). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: dancing lights
1/day each: darkness, faerie fire
ast.target: 卓尔精灵的施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 11）。它可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：\n随意施放：舞动光球\n每日各1次：黑暗术，妖火

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the drow has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下时，卓尔精灵在攻击检定以及依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit (+4 to hit with shillelagh), reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage with shillelagh or if wielded with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2（使用橡棍术时命中+4），触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）点钝击伤害，或使用橡棍术或双手持握时为6（1d8 + 2）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dryad's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). The dryad can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: druidcraft
3/day each: entangle, goodberry
1/day each: barkskin, pass without trace, shillelagh
ast.target:
树精的天生施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 14）。树精可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意施放：德鲁伊伎俩
每日各3次：纠缠术，神莓术
每日各1次：树肤术，行动无踪，橡棍术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 树精在对抗法术及其他魔法效应的豁免中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dryad can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.
ast.target: 树精可以与野兽和植物交流，如同它们共享一种语言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once on her turn, the dryad can use 10 ft. of her movement to step magically into one living tree within her reach and emerge from a second living tree within 60 ft. of the first tree, appearing in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of the second tree. Both trees must be large or bigger.
ast.target: 树精每回合一次，可以消耗10尺移动力，魔法般地踏入其触及范围内的一棵活树，并从第一棵树60尺范围内的第二棵活树中走出，出现在第二棵树5尺内的未占据空间。两棵树都必须是大型或更大。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit (+6 to hit with shillelagh), reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1 d4) bludgeoning damage, or 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage with shillelagh.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2（使用橡棍术时命中+6），触及5尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）点钝击伤害，或使用橡棍术时为8（1d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The duergar has advantage on saving throws against poison, spells, and illusions, as well as to resist being charmed or paralyzed.
ast.target: 灰矮人在对抗毒素、法术和幻术的豁免中，以及在抵抗魅惑或麻痹时，具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the duergar has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下时，灰矮人在攻击检定以及依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage, or 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage while enlarged.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害，变大时为11（2d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage while enlarged.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺或射程30/120尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害，变大时为9（2d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The duergar magically turns invisible until it attacks, casts a spell, or uses its Enlarge, or until its concentration is broken, up to 1 hour (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the duergar wears or carries is invisible with it .
ast.target: 灰矮人魔法般地隐形，直到它攻击、施法、使用其变大能力，或直到其专注被打破，最长持续1小时（如同专注于一个法术）。灰矮人穿戴或携带的任何装备也随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of dust. Each creature within 5 ft. of it must then succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw on each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 当气精死亡时，它会在一阵尘土中爆炸。其5尺范围内的每个生物必须通过一次DC 10的体质豁免，否则将失明1分钟。失明的生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复豁免，成功则结束该效应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast sleep, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 气精可以天生施放睡眠术，无需材料成分。其天生施法属性为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of blinding dust. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 气精喷出一个15尺锥形的致盲尘埃。该区域内的每个生物必须通过一次DC 10的敏捷豁免，否则将失明1分钟。生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复豁免，成功则结束该效应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The eagle has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 鹰在依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the elemental doesn't disturb the material it moves through.
ast.target: 元素生物可以挖掘穿行非魔法的、未经加工的泥土和岩石。这样做时，元素生物不会扰动其穿行的物质。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.
ast.target: 元素生物对物体和建筑造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the efreeti dies, its body disintegrates in a flash of fire and puff of smoke, leaving behind only equipment the djinni was wearing or carrying.
ast.target: 如果火巨灵死亡，其身体会在一阵火焰和烟雾中消散，只留下它穿戴或携带的装备。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The efreeti makes two scimitar attacks or uses its Hurl Flame twice.
ast.target: 火巨灵进行两次弯刀攻击或使用其投掷火焰两次。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d6 + 6）点挥砍伤害外加7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (5d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 远程法术攻击：命中+7，射程120尺，单一目标。命中：17（5d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elephant moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the elephant can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果大象直线移动至少20尺冲向一个生物，并在同一回合内用其角撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标必须通过一次DC 12的力量豁免，否则将被击倒。如果目标倒地，大象可以用一个附赠动作对其进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：19（3d8 + 6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，单一倒地生物。命中：22（3d10 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elk moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果麋鹿直线移动至少20尺冲向一个目标，并在同一回合内用其冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到7（2d6）点伤害。如果目标是生物，其必须通过一次DC 13的力量豁免，否则将被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一倒地生物。命中：8（2d4 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes's weapon attacks are magical and deal an extra 13 (3d8) poison damage on a hit (included in the attacks).
ast.target: 厄里倪厄斯的武器攻击是魔法性的，命中时额外造成13（3d8）点毒素伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 该怪物在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes makes three attacks
ast.target: 该怪物进行三次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 13 (3d8) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害，或双手使用时为9（1d10 + 4）点挥砍伤害，外加13（3d8）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 13 (3d8) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned. The poison lasts until it is removed by the lesser restoration spell or similar magic.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+7，射程150/600尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加13（3d8）点毒素伤害，且目标必须成功通过一次DC 14的体质豁免检定，否则中毒。该毒素持续存在，直到被次级复原术或类似魔法移除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Some erinyes carry a rope of entanglement (detailed in the Dungeon Master's Guide). When such an erinyes uses its Multiattack, the erinyes can use the rope in place of two of the attacks.
ast.target: 有些怪物携带纠缠绳（详见《地下城主指南》）。当此类怪物使用多重攻击时，可以用该绳索替代其中两次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes adds 4 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the erinyes must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 该怪物对一次即将命中它的近战攻击，其AC获得+4加值。为此，该怪物必须能看到攻击者并持握近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 该怪物可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in contact with a web, the ettercap knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.
ast.target: 当与蛛网接触时，该怪物能精确知晓同一蛛网内任何其他生物的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettercap ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.
ast.target: 该怪物无视由蛛网造成的移动限制。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettercap makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 该怪物进行两次攻击：一次使用其啮咬，一次使用其爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettin has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious.
ast.target: 该怪物在感知（察觉）检定以及对抗致盲、魅惑、耳聋、恐惧、震慑和击昏的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When one of the ettin's heads is asleep, its other head is awake.
ast.target: 当该怪物的一个头颅沉睡时，其另一个头颅保持清醒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettin makes two attacks: one with its battleaxe and one with its morningstar.
ast.target: 该怪物进行两次攻击：一次使用其战斧，一次使用其晨星。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The elemental sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light in an additional 30 ft..
ast.target: 该元素生物在30尺半径内散发明亮光线，并在额外30尺内散发昏暗光线。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For every 5 ft. the elemental moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 cold damage.
ast.target: 该元素生物在水中每移动5尺，或每被泼洒一加仑水，就会受到1点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The elemental makes two touch attacks.
ast.target: 该元素生物进行两次触碰攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点火焰伤害。如果目标是生物或可燃物，它会被点燃。在生物花费一个动作扑灭火焰之前，目标在其每个回合开始时受到5（1d10）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two greatsword attacks.
ast.target: 该巨人进行两次巨剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (6d6 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+11，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：28（6d6 + 7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+11，射程60/240尺，单一目标。命中：29（4d10 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the golem takes fire damage, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果该魔像受到火焰伤害，它在攻击检定和属性检定上具有劣势，直到其下一回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever the golem is subjected to lightning damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hit points equal to the lightning damage dealt.
ast.target: 每当该魔像受到闪电伤害时，它不受到伤害，而是恢复等于所受闪电伤害值的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The snake doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.
ast.target: 当该蛇飞离敌人的触及范围时，不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 7 (3d4) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害外加7（3d4）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sword is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the sword must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.
ast.target: 该剑在反魔法场区域内时失去行动能力。如果被解除魔法针对，该剑必须成功通过一次对抗施法者法术豁免DC的体质豁免检定，否则陷入昏迷1分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the sword remains motionless and isn't flying, it is indistinguishable from a normal sword.
ast.target: 当该剑保持静止且不飞行时，它与普通剑无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The frog can breathe air and water
ast.target: 该蛙可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The frog's long jump is up to 10 ft. and its high jump is up to 5 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 该蛙的远跳距离可达10尺，高跳距离可达5尺，无论是否有助跑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two greataxe attacks.
ast.target: 该巨人进行两次巨斧攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d12 + 6) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：25（3d12 + 6）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+9，射程60/240尺，单一目标。命中：28（4d10 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the gargoyle remains motion less, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate statue.
ast.target: 当该石像鬼保持静止时，它与无生命的雕像无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gargoyle makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 该石像鬼进行两次攻击：一次使用其啮咬，一次使用其爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Even when the cube is in plain sight, it takes a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to spot a cube that has neither moved nor attacked. A creature that tries to enter the cube's space while unaware of the cube is surprised by the cube.
ast.target: 即使该方块在视线内，也需要一次成功的DC 15感知（察觉）检定才能发现一个既未移动也未攻击的方块。一个试图进入该方块空间但未察觉该方块的生物会被该方块突袭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：10（3d6）点强酸伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any creature that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the ghast must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the ghast's Stench for 24 hours.
ast.target: 任何在其回合开始时位于该怪物5尺内的生物，必须成功通过一次DC 10的体质豁免检定，否则中毒直到其下一回合开始。豁免成功后，该生物对该怪物的恶臭免疫24小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghast and any ghouls within 30 ft. of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.
ast.target: 该怪物以及其30尺范围内的任何食尸鬼，在对抗驱散亡灵效果的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：12（2d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghost can see 60 ft. into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.
ast.target: 当该幽灵位于物质位面时，它可以看入以太位面60尺，反之亦然。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 该幽灵可以穿过其他生物和物体，如同它们是困难地形。如果它在物体内部结束回合，则受到5（1d10）点力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) necrotic damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：17（4d6 + 3）点黯蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghost enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. It is visible on the Material Plane while it is in the Border Ethereal, and vice versa, yet it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.
ast.target: 该幽灵从物质位面进入以太位面，或反之。当它在边界以太时，它在物质位面可见，反之亦然，但它无法影响或被另一侧位面的任何事物影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：9（2d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：22（3d10 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 50/100 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (7d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+9，射程50/100尺，单一目标。命中：30（7d6+6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The badger makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 獾进行两次攻击：一次用其咬，一次用其爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（2d4+1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a tusk attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果野猪在同一回合内直线移动至少20尺冲向一个目标，然后用其獠牙攻击命中该目标，则该目标受到额外7（2d6）挥砍伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC13的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar takes 10 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 如果野猪受到10点或更少的伤害，且该伤害会将其生命值降至0，则其生命值降至1点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6+3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6+1）钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC11）。螃蟹有两只钳爪，每只只能擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6+3）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elk moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果麋鹿在同一回合内直线移动至少20尺冲向一个目标，然后用其冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标受到额外7（2d6）伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC14的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc

ast.source: The beetle sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft..

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The frog's long jump is up to 20 ft. and its high jump is up to 10 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 青蛙的远跳距离可达20尺，高跳距离可达10尺，无论是否有助跑。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6+1）穿刺伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC11）。在此擒抱结束前，该目标被束缚，且青蛙无法再咬另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the goat moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果山羊在同一回合内直线移动至少20尺冲向一个目标，然后用其冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标受到额外5（2d4）钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC13的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The goat has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.
ast.target: 山羊在对抗可能使其倒地的效果时，进行力量和敏捷豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（2d4+3）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the hyena reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the hyena can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.
ast.target: 当鬣狗在其回合内通过一次近战攻击将一个生物的生命值降至0时，它可以使用一个附赠动作移动至多其速度的一半，并进行一次咬击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6+3）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizard can hold its breath for 15 minutes. (A lizard that has this trait also has a swimming speed of 30 feet.)
ast.target: 蜥蜴可以屏住呼吸15分钟。（拥有此特性的蜥蜴也具有30尺的游泳速度。）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 蜥蜴可以攀爬困难表面，包括在天花板上倒挂，无需进行能力检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 1 hour.
ast.target: 离开水后，章鱼可以屏住呼吸1小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The octopus has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.
ast.target: 章鱼在水下进行敏捷（隐匿）检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The octopus can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 章鱼只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the octopus can't use its tentacles on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6+3）钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC16）。在此擒抱结束前，该目标被束缚，且章鱼无法对其触手用于另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A 20-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果章鱼在水下，它周围会形成一个半径20尺的墨汁云。该区域在1分钟内处于重度遮蔽状态，尽管显著的水流可以驱散墨汁。释放墨汁后，章鱼可以使用一个附赠动作进行疾走动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owl doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.
ast.target: 猫头鹰飞离敌人触及范围时不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owl has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.
ast.target: 猫头鹰在进行依赖听觉或视觉的感知检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（2d6+1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d4+4）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC11的体质豁免，失败则受到10（3d6）毒素伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8+2）钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC12）。蝎子有两只钳爪，每只只能擒抱一个目标。

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d10+2）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC12的体质豁免，失败则受到22（4d10）毒素伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the sea horse moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果海马在同一回合内直线移动至少20尺冲向一个目标，然后用其冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标受到额外7（2d6）钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC11的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6+1）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shark has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 鲨鱼对任何生命值未满的生物进行近战攻击检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：22（3d10+6）穿刺伤害。

ast.source: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 蜘蛛可以攀爬困难表面，包括在天花板上倒挂，无需进行能力检定。

ast.target: 当与蛛网接触时，蜘蛛能精确感知同一蛛网上任何其他生物的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.
ast.target: 蜘蛛无视由蛛网造成的移动限制。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The toad can breathe air and water
ast.target: 蟾蜍能在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.source: The toad's long jump is up to 20 ft. and its high jump is up to 10 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 蟾蜍的长跳距离可达20英尺，高跳距离可达10英尺，无论是否有助跑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vulture has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.
ast.target: 秃鹫在依赖视觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vulture has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果秃鹫的至少一名盟友位于目标生物5英尺内且该盟友未失能，则秃鹫对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vulture makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 秃鹫进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d6 + 2）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The weasel has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 鼬鼠在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ground in a 10-foot radius around the mouther is doughlike difficult terrain. Each creature that starts its turn in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or have its speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 吞噬者周围10英尺半径内的地面如同面团般难以通行。每个在该区域开始其回合的生物必须成功通过DC 10的力量豁免，否则其速度降至0，直到其下一回合开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gibbering mouther makes one bite attack and, if it can, uses its Blinding Spittle.
ast.target: 呓语吞噬者进行一次撕咬攻击，如果可能，还会使用其致盲唾液。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 17 (5d6) piercing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is killed by this damage, it is absorbed into the mouther.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：17（5d6）穿刺伤害。如果目标为中型或更小体型，其必须成功通过DC 10的力量豁免，否则被击倒。如果目标因此伤害而死亡，其将被吞噬者吸收。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mouther spits a chemical glob at a point it can see within 15 feet of it. The glob explodes in a blinding flash of light on impact. Each creature within 5 feet of the flash must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded until the end of the mouther's next turn.
ast.target: 吞噬者向其视野内15英尺内的一点喷射一团化学粘液。粘液在撞击时爆发出致盲的闪光。闪光周围5英尺内的每个生物必须成功通过DC 13的敏捷豁免，否则在吞噬者下一回合结束前处于目盲状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The glabrezu's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16). The glabrezu can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: darkness, detect magic, dispel magic
1/day each: confusion, fly, power word stun
ast.target: 格拉布雷祖的施法属性为智力（法术豁免DC 16）。格拉布雷祖可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：\n随意施放：黑暗术、侦测魔法、解除魔法\n每日各1次：困惑术、飞行术、震慑律令

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The glabrezu has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 格拉布雷祖对法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The glabrezu makes four attacks: two with its pincers and two with its fists. Alternatively, it makes two attacks with its pincers and casts one spell.
ast.target: 格拉布雷祖进行四次攻击：两次用巨钳，两次用拳头。或者，它进行两次巨钳攻击并施放一个法术。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 15). The glabrezu has two pincers, each of which can grapple only one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d10 + 5）钝击伤害。如果目标为中型或更小体型的生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 15）。格拉布雷祖有两个巨钳，每个巨钳只能擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gladiator has advantage on saving throws against being frightened.
ast.target: 角斗士对恐惧状态的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the gladiator hits with it (included in the attack).
ast.target: 当角斗士使用近战武器命中时，该武器额外造成一个伤害骰的伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gladiator makes three melee attacks or two ranged attacks.
ast.target: 角斗士进行三次近战攻击或两次远程攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. and range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺及射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）穿刺伤害，或如果双手持握进行近战攻击则为13（2d8 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：9（2d4 + 4）钝击伤害。如果目标为中型或更小体型的生物，其必须成功通过DC 15的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gladiator adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the gladiator must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 角斗士可以将其AC加3，以对抗一次可能命中它的近战攻击。为此，角斗士必须能看到攻击者并持握近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the gnoll reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the gnoll can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.
ast.target: 当豺狼人在其回合内通过近战攻击将一个生物的生命值降至0时，它可以使用附赠动作移动至多其速度的一半并进行一次撕咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害，或如果双手持握进行近战攻击则为6（1d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+3，射程150/600英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the goat moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果山羊向一个目标直线移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合内用冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到2（1d4）钝击伤害。如果目标为生物，其必须成功通过DC 10的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4 + 1）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.
ast.target: 地精可以在其每个回合中使用附赠动作进行脱离接触或躲藏动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程80/320英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d10 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
