ast.source: If the gorgon moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the gorgon can make one attack with its hooves against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果蛇龙向一个生物直线移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合内用角撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标必须成功通过DC 16的力量豁免，否则被击倒。如果目标倒地，蛇龙可以使用附赠动作对其进行一次蹄踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：18（2d12 + 5）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d10 + 5）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 软泥怪可以穿过窄至1英寸宽的空间而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the ooze remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an oily pool or wet rock.
ast.target: 当软泥怪保持静止时，它与油池或湿岩石无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害加3（1d6）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙喷吐出15英尺锥形的有毒气体。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 11的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到21（6d6）毒素伤害，豁免成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 女巫能在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The hag's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: dancing lights, minor illusion, vicious mockery
ast.target: 女巫的天生施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 12）。她可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：\n\n随意施放：舞动之光、次级幻术、恶言相加

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.
ast.target: 女巫能模仿动物声音和类人生物的声音。听到声音的生物可以通过成功的DC 14感知（洞察）检定辨别出这是模仿。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag magically turns invisible until she attacks or casts a spell, or until her concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). While invisible, she leaves no physical evidence of her passage, so she can be tracked only by magic. Any equipment she wears or carries is invisible with her.
ast.target: 女巫神奇地隐形，直到她攻击或施法，或直到她的专注结束（如同专注一个法术）。隐形期间，她不会留下任何物理痕迹，因此只能通过魔法追踪。她穿戴或携带的任何装备也随她隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grick has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 格里克在岩石地形中进行躲藏的敏捷（隐匿）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grick makes one attack with its tentacles. If that attack hits, the grick can make one beak attack against the same target.
ast.target: 格里克用其触手进行一次攻击。如果该攻击命中，格里克可以对同一目标进行一次喙击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The griffon has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 狮鹫在依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The griffon makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.
ast.target: 狮鹫进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grimlock can't use its blindsight while deafened and unable to smell.
ast.target: 当格里克耳聋且无法嗅闻时，它无法使用其盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grimlock has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 格里克在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grimlock has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 格里克在岩石地形中进行的隐匿（敏捷）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点钝击伤害外加2（1d4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺或射程20/60尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害，或如果双手持握进行近战攻击则为5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If it dies, the naga returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its hit points. Only a wish spell can prevent this trait from functioning.
ast.target: 如果纳迦死亡，它会在1d6天后复活并恢复所有生命值。只有祈愿术才能阻止此特性生效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，单一生物。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免，失败则受到45（10d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 15/30 ft., one creature. Hit: The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+8，射程15/30尺，单一生物。命中：目标必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免，失败则受到45（10d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The veteran makes two longsword attacks. If it has a shortsword drawn, it can also make a shortsword attack.
ast.target: 老兵进行两次长剑攻击。如果它已拔出短剑，它还可以进行一次短剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点挥砍伤害，或如果双手持握则为8（1d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+3，射程100/400尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d10 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The veteran exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 老兵在一个15尺锥形区域内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 15的敏捷豁免，失败则受到24（7d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The harpy makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its club.
ast.target: 鹰身女妖进行两次攻击：一次用爪，一次用棍棒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 猎犬在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果猎犬的至少一名盟友位于目标生物5尺内且该盟友未失能，则猎犬对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hound exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 猎犬在一个15尺锥形区域内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12的敏捷豁免，失败则受到21（6d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hezrou has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 赫兹罗在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the hezrou must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the hezrou's stench for 24 hours.
ast.target: 任何在赫兹罗10尺内开始其回合的生物必须成功通过一次DC 14的体质豁免，否则将中毒直到其下一回合开始。豁免成功后，该生物在24小时内免疫赫兹罗的恶臭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hezrou makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 赫兹罗进行三次攻击：一次用咬，两次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.
ast.target: 巨人进行两次巨棒攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：18（3d8 + 5）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+8，射程60/240尺，单一目标。命中：21（3d10 + 5）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hippogriff has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 鹰马在依赖视觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hippogriff makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.
ast.target: 鹰马进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per turn, the hobgoblin can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage to a creature it hits with a weapon attack if that creature is within 5 ft. of an ally of the hobgoblin that isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 每回合一次，如果被命中的生物位于一名未失能的哥布林盟友5尺内，哥布林可以对其武器攻击命中的生物额外造成7（2d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage, or 6 (1d10 + 1) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点挥砍伤害，或如果双手持握则为6（1d10 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, it can magically convey what it senses to its master, and the two can communicate telepathically.
ast.target: 当魔像与其主人处于同一存在位面时，它可以将其感知到的信息魔法般地传递给主人，并且两者可以心灵感应交流。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three melee attacks: two with its fork and one with its tail. It can use Hurl Flame in place of any melee attack.
ast.target: 恶魔进行三次近战攻击：两次用叉，一次用尾。它可以用投掷火焰代替任何近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d8 + 6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.
ast.target: 远程法术攻击：命中+7，射程150尺，单一目标。命中：14（4d6）点火焰伤害。如果目标是一个未被穿戴或携带的可燃物体，它还会着火。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.
ast.target: 九头蛇可以屏息1小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra reaction that can be used only for opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 九头蛇每多一个头（超过一个），它就获得一个额外的反应，该反应只能用于借机攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the hydra sleeps, at least one of its heads is awake.
ast.target: 当九头蛇睡眠时，它至少有一个头是醒着的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hydra makes as many bite attacks as it has heads.
ast.target: 九头蛇进行与其头数相等的咬击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d10 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hyena has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果鬣狗的至少一名盟友位于目标生物5尺内且该盟友未失能，则鬣狗对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three attacks: one with its bite, one with its claws, and one with its tail.
ast.target: 恶魔进行三次攻击：一次用咬，一次用爪，一次用尾。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点穿刺伤害外加10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d4 + 5）点挥砍伤害外加10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack:+10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点钝击伤害外加10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of jagged ice. Each creature within 5 ft. of it must make a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 当米菲特死亡时，它会爆裂成一团锯齿状的冰。其5尺内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 10的敏捷豁免，失败则受到4（1d8）点挥砍伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the mephit remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary shard of ice.
ast.target: 当冰魔保持静止不动时，它与普通的冰块碎片无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast fog cloud, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 冰魔可以天生施展云雾术，无需任何材料成分。其天生施法能力基于魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：3（1d4+1）点挥砍伤害，外加2（1d4）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of cold air. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 冰魔呼出一个15尺锥形的寒冷空气。该区域内的每个生物必须成功通过一次DC 10的敏捷豁免，失败则受到5（2d4）点寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Magical darkness doesn't impede the imp's darkvision.
ast.target: 魔法黑暗不会阻碍小鬼的黑暗视觉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The imp has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 小鬼在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4+3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC 11的体质豁免，失败则受到10（3d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The imp magically turns invisible until it attacks, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the imp wears or carries is invisible with it.
ast.target: 小鬼会魔法般地隐形，直到它发动攻击或专注结束（如同专注于一个法术）。小鬼穿戴或携带的任何装备也随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The stalker is invisible.
ast.target: 追踪者是隐形的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The stalker is given a quarry by its summoner. The stalker knows the direction and distance to its quarry as long as the two of them are on the same plane of existence. The stalker also knows the location of its summoner.
ast.target: 追踪者由其召唤者指定一个目标。只要追踪者与其目标处于同一存在位面，追踪者就知道目标的方向和距离。追踪者也知道其召唤者的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The stalker makes two slam attacks.
ast.target: 追踪者进行两次猛击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6+3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever the golem is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hit points equal to the fire damage dealt.
ast.target: 每当魔像受到火焰伤害时，它不受伤害，反而恢复等于所受火焰伤害值的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The golem makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 魔像进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：20（3d8+7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (3d10 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：23（3d10+7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The golem exhales poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (l0d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 魔像在一个15尺锥形区域内呼出有毒气体。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 19的体质豁免，失败则受到45（10d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jackal has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 豺狼在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知检定上有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jackal has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackal's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一个豺狼的盟友位于目标生物5尺范围内，且该盟友未失能，则豺狼对该生物的攻击检定有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The whale can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 鲸鱼在耳聋时无法使用其盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes
ast.target: 鲸鱼可以屏住呼吸30分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The whale has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.
ast.target: 鲸鱼在依赖听觉的感知检定上有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (5d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：21（5d6+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The knight has advantage on saving throws against being frightened.
ast.target: 骑士在对抗恐惧状态的豁免检定上有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The knight makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 骑士进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d10) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+2，射程100/400尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d10）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The knight adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the knight must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 骑士可以将其AC加2来对抗一次即将命中它的近战攻击。为此，骑士必须看到攻击者并持有一件近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下时，狗头人的攻击检定以及依赖视觉的感知检定处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kobold has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一个狗头人的盟友位于目标生物5尺范围内，且该盟友未失能，则狗头人对该生物的攻击检定有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程30/120尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4+2）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 海怪可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken ignores difficult terrain, and magical effects can't reduce its speed or cause it to be restrained. It can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or being grappled.
ast.target: 海怪忽略困难地形，魔法效应无法降低其速度或使其受缚。它可以花费5尺移动速度来挣脱非魔法束缚或擒抱状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.
ast.target: 海怪对物体和建筑造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken makes three tentacle attacks, each of which it can replace with one use of Fling.
ast.target: 海怪进行三次触手攻击，每次攻击都可以替换为一次使用“投掷”动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d6 + 10) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The kraken has ten tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及30尺，单一目标。命中：20（3d6+10）点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 18）。在此擒抱结束前，目标处于受缚状态。海怪有十根触手，每根触手可以擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken magically creates three bolts of lightning, each of which can strike a target the kraken can see within 120 feet of it. A target must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 海怪魔法般地创造出三道闪电，每一道都可以击中海怪可见范围120尺内的一个目标。目标必须进行一次DC 23的敏捷豁免，失败则受到22（4d10）点闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken makes one tentacle attack or uses its Fling.
ast.target: 海怪进行一次触手攻击或使用其“投掷”动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken uses Lightning Storm.
ast.target: 海怪使用“闪电风暴”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lamia's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components. At will: disguise self (any humanoid form), major image 3/day each: charm person, mirror image, scrying, suggestion 1/day: geas
ast.target: 拉米亚的天生施法能力基于魅力（法术豁免DC 13）。它可以天生施展以下法术，无需任何材料成分。随意施展：易容术（任意类人形态）、高等幻影；每日3次：魅惑人类、镜像术、探知术、暗示术；每日1次：指使术。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lamia makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its dagger or Intoxicating Touch.
ast.target: 拉米亚进行两次攻击：一次使用其爪击，一次使用其匕首或“迷醉之触”。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d10+3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4+3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is magically cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws and all ability checks.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：目标被魔法诅咒1小时。诅咒持续期间，目标在感知豁免和所有属性检定上处于劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Magical darkness doesn't impede the lemure's darkvision.
ast.target: 魔法黑暗不会阻碍劣魔的黑暗视觉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lemure that dies in the Nine Hells comes back to life with all its hit points in 1d10 days unless it is killed by a good-aligned creature with a bless spell cast on that creature or its remains are sprinkled with holy water.
ast.target: 一个在九层地狱中死亡的劣魔会在1d10天后复活并恢复所有生命值，除非它被一个受过“祝福”法术影响的善良阵营生物杀死，或者其遗骸被洒上圣水。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 如果巫妖豁免失败，它可以选择豁免成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If it has a phylactery, a destroyed lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the phylactery.
ast.target: 如果巫妖拥有命匣，被摧毁的巫妖会在1d10天内获得一个新的身体，恢复所有生命值并重新活动。新身体出现在命匣5尺范围内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.
ast.target: 巫妖在对抗任何驱散亡灵效果的豁免检定上有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) cold damage. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：命中+12，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。目标必须成功通过一次DC 18的体质豁免，否则将麻痹1分钟。目标可以在其每回合结束时重复豁免，成功则结束自身上的该效应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich casts a cantrip.
ast.target: 巫妖施放了一个戏法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich uses its Paralyzing Touch.
ast.target: 巫妖使用其麻痹之触。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each living creature within 20 feet of the lich must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw against this magic, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巫妖20英尺范围内的每个活物必须进行一次DC 18的体质豁免，对抗此魔法，豁免失败则受到21（6d6）点黯蚀伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lion has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 狮子在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lion has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果狮子的至少一个盟友在目标生物5英尺范围内，且该盟友未失能，则狮子对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the lion moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the lion can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果狮子向一个生物直线移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合内用爪击命中该目标，则该目标必须成功通过一次DC 13的力量豁免，否则被击倒在地。如果目标倒地，狮子可以使用一个附赠动作对其发动一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can long jump up to 25 ft..
ast.target: 在助跑10英尺后，狮子可以跳跃最远25英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+0，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizardfolk can hold its breath for 15 minutes.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人可以屏住呼吸15分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizardfolk makes two melee attacks, each one with a different weapon.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人发动两次近战攻击，每次使用不同的武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺或射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of lava. Each creature within 5 ft. of it must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 当米比特死亡时，它会爆炸成一股熔岩。其5英尺范围内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 11的敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the mephit remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary mound of magma.
ast.target: 当米比特保持静止不动时，它与普通的岩浆堆无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast heat metal (spell save DC 10), requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 米比特可以天生施放‘灼热金属’（法术豁免DC 10），无需材料成分。其天生施法属性为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：3（1d4 + 1）点挥砍伤害加2（1d4）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of fire. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 米比特呼出一个15英尺锥形的火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 11的敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the magmin can set itself ablaze or extinguish its flames. While ablaze, the magmin sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft.
ast.target: 作为附赠动作，玛格民可以点燃自身或熄灭火焰。当燃烧时，玛格民在10英尺半径内发出明亮光线，并在额外10英尺内发出微光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it ignites. Until a target takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the end of each of its turns.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d6）点火焰伤害。如果目标是生物或易燃物体，它会被点燃。在目标采取行动扑灭火焰之前，它在每个回合结束时受到3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the mammoth moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the mammoth can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果猛犸象向一个生物直线移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合内用角顶攻击命中该目标，则该目标必须成功通过一次DC 18的力量豁免，否则被击倒在地。如果目标倒地，猛犸象可以使用一个附赠动作对其发动一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：25（4d8 + 7）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5英尺，单一倒地生物。命中：29（4d10 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The manticore has twenty-four tail spikes. Used spikes regrow when the manticore finishes a long rest.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮有二十四根尾刺。使用过的尾刺会在蝎尾狮完成一次长休后重新长出。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The manticore makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws or three with its tail spikes.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮发动三次攻击：一次用啃咬，两次用爪击，或者三次用尾刺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 100/200 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程100/200英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 魅魔在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 魅魔的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith can take one reaction on every turn in combat.
ast.target: 魅魔在战斗中的每一回合都可以使用一次反应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith can make seven attacks: six with its longswords and one with its tail.
ast.target: 魅魔可以发动七次攻击：六次用长剑，一次用尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 魅魔进行魔法传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，最多120英尺到一个它能看到的未占据空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith adds 5 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the marilith must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 魅魔在对抗一次可能命中它的近战攻击时，其护甲等级增加5。为此，魅魔必须能看到攻击者并持有一件近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mastiff has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 獒犬在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 11的力量豁免，否则被击倒在地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The medusa makes either three melee attacks —  one with its snake hair and two with its shortsword — or two ranged attacks with its longbow.
ast.target: 美杜莎可以发动三次近战攻击——一次用蛇发，两次用短剑——或者发动两次远程攻击，使用长弓。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害加14（4d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程150/600英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害加7（2d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The merfolk can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 人鱼可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage, or 4 (1d8) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）点穿刺伤害，或如果双手持握进行近战攻击则为4（1d8）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The merrow can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 默罗可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The merrow makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or harpoon.
ast.target: 默罗发动两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击或鱼叉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d4 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it must succeed on a Strength contest against the merrow or be pulled up to 20 feet toward the merrow.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是超大型或更小的生物，它必须在与默罗的力量对抗中成功，否则被拉向默罗最多20英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mimic can use its action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn 't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 拟态怪可以使用其动作变形为一个物体，或变回其真实的、无定形的形态。它在两种形态下的属性数据相同。它穿戴或携带的任何装备不会被转化。如果它死亡，它会变回真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic is also grappled by it (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage.
ast.target: 拟态怪会粘附在任何接触它的东西上。一个被拟态怪粘附的超大型或更小的生物也会被其擒抱（逃脱DC 13）。为逃脱此擒抱而进行的属性检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the mimic remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary object.
ast.target: 当拟态怪保持静止不动时，它与普通物体无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mimic has advantage on attack rolls against any creature grappled by it.
ast.target: 拟态怪对任何被其擒抱的生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the mimic is in object form, the target is subjected to its Adhesive trait.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点钝击伤害。如果拟态怪处于物体形态，目标会受到其粘附特性的影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害加4（1d8）点强酸伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the minotaur moves at least 10 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 ft. away and knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果牛头怪直线移动至少10尺朝向一个目标，并在同一回合内用角撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到9（2d8）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 14的力量豁免检定，否则将被推开至多10尺并被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The minotaur can perfectly recall any path it has traveled.
ast.target: 牛头怪能完美回忆它走过的任何路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the minotaur can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，牛头怪可以使其在该回合内进行的所有近战武器攻击检定获得优势，但针对它的攻击检定在其下一回合开始前也具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d12 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the skeleton moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away and knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果骷髅直线移动至少10尺朝向一个目标，并在同一回合内用角撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到9（2d8）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 14的力量豁免检定，否则将被推开至多10尺并被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mule is considered to be a Large animal for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.
ast.target: 在确定其负重能力时，骡被视为大型动物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mule has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.
ast.target: 骡在对抗可能将其击倒的效果时，进行的力量和敏捷豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy can use its Dreadful Glare and makes one attack with its rotting fist.
ast.target: 木乃伊可以使用其恐怖凝视，并用其腐烂之拳进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A destroyed mummy lord gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the mummy lord's heart.
ast.target: 如果木乃伊领主的心脏完好无损，被摧毁的木乃伊领主将在24小时内获得一个新的身体，恢复所有生命值并重新活动。新身体出现在木乃伊领主心脏5尺范围内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord makes one attack with its rotting fist or uses its Dreadful Glare.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主用其腐烂之拳进行一次攻击，或使用其恐怖凝视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Blinding dust and sand swirls magically around the mummy lord. Each creature within 5 feet of the mummy lord must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of the creature's next turn.
ast.target: 致盲的尘沙在木乃伊领主周围魔法般地旋转。木乃伊领主5尺范围内的每个生物必须成功通过一次DC 16的体质豁免检定，否则将失明直至该生物下一回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord utters a blasphemous word. Each non-undead creature within 10 feet of the mummy lord that can hear the magical utterance must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of the mummy lord's next turn.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主说出一个亵渎之词。木乃伊领主10尺范围内每个能听到此魔法话语的非亡灵生物必须成功通过一次DC 16的体质豁免检定，否则将被震慑直至木乃伊领主下一回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord magically unleashes negative energy. Creatures within 60 feet of the mummy lord, including ones behind barriers and around corners, can't regain hit points until the end of the mummy lord's next turn.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主魔法般地释放负能量。木乃伊领主60尺范围内的生物，包括在障碍物后面和拐角处的生物，在木乃伊领主下一回合结束前无法恢复生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nalfeshnee has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 纳尔菲什尼在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nalfeshnee uses Horror Nimbus if it can.  It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 纳尔菲什尼如果可以，会使用恐怖光环。然后它进行三次攻击：一次用其撕咬，两次用其爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (5d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：32（5d10 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：15（3d6 + 5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nalfeshnee magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 纳尔菲什尼魔法般地传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，至多120尺到一个它能看到的未被占据的空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The hag's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect magic, magic missile
2/day each: plane shift (self only), ray of enfeeblement, sleep
ast.target:
女巫的天生施法能力是魅力（法术豁免DC 14，法术攻击命中+6）。她可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意施放：侦测魔法、魔法飞弹
每日各2次：位面转移（仅限自身）、衰弱射线、睡眠术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 女巫在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag magically polymorphs into a Small or Medium female humanoid, or back into her true form. Her statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. She reverts to her true form if she dies.
ast.target: 女巫魔法般地变形为小型或中型类人生物女性，或变回其真实形态。她在每种形态下的属性值相同。她穿戴或携带的任何装备不会被转化。如果她死亡，她会变回真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. To do so, the hag must have a heartstone in her possession.
ast.target: 女巫魔法般地从物质位面进入以太位面，反之亦然。为此，女巫必须拥有一颗心石。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nightmare can grant resistance to fire damage to anyone riding it.
ast.target: 梦魇可以赋予任何骑乘它的人火焰伤害抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nightmare sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.
ast.target: 梦魇在10尺半径内散发明亮光线，并在额外10尺内散发微光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害外加7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nightmare and up to three willing creatures within 5 feet of it magically enter the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa.
ast.target: 梦魇和其5尺范围内至多三个自愿生物魔法般地从物质位面进入以太位面，反之亦然。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The noble adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the noble must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 贵族在对抗一次可能命中它的近战攻击时，将其AC提高2。为此，贵族必须能看到攻击者并持有一件近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jelly can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 果冻可以通过窄至1英寸宽的空间而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jelly can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 果冻可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d6 + 2）点钝击伤害外加3（1d6）点强酸伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a jelly that is Medium or larger is subjected to lightning or slashing damage, it splits into two new jellies if it has at least 10 hit points. Each new jelly has hit points equal to half the original jelly's, rounded down. New jellies are one size smaller than the original jelly.
ast.target: 当一个中型或更大的果冻受到闪电或挥砍伤害时，如果它至少有10点生命值，它会分裂成两个新的果冻。每个新果冻的生命值等于原果冻生命值的一半，向下取整。新果冻比原果冻小一个体型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 30 minutes.
ast.target: 离开水时，章鱼可以屏住呼吸30分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 10). Until this grapple ends, the octopus can't use its tentacles on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 10）。在此擒抱结束前，章鱼不能对另一个目标使用其触手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A 5-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果章鱼在水下，它周围会形成一个5尺半径的墨汁云。该区域在1分钟内处于重度遮蔽状态，尽管显著的水流可以驱散墨汁。释放墨汁后，章鱼可以将疾走动作作为附赠动作使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺或射程30/120尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hit points, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5+the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 如果伤害将僵尸的生命值降至0，它必须进行一次体质豁免检定，DC为5+所受伤害值，除非伤害是光耀伤害或来自重击。成功时，僵尸的生命值降至1点而非0。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The oni's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). The oni can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: darkness, invisibility
1/day each: charm person, cone of cold, gaseous form, sleep
ast.target:
鬼婆的天生施法能力是魅力（法术豁免DC 13）。鬼婆可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意施放：黑暗术、隐形术
每日各1次：魅惑人类、冷冻锥、气化形体、睡眠术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 鬼婆的武器攻击是魔法性的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point.
ast.target: 如果鬼婆至少有1点生命值，它在其回合开始时恢复10点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni makes two attacks, either with its claws or its glaive.
ast.target: 鬼婆进行两次攻击，用其爪击或其长柄刀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage in Small or Medium form.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点挥砍伤害，或在小型或中型形态下为9（1d10 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.
ast.target: 作为附赠动作，兽人可以向其能看到的一个敌对生物移动至多其速度的距离。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺或射程30/120尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The otyugh can magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120 ft. of it that can understand a language. This form of telepathy doesn't allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.
ast.target: 奥提格可以魔法般地向其120尺范围内任何能理解语言的生物传递简单的信息和图像。这种心灵感应形式不允许接收生物进行心灵感应回应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The otyugh makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its tentacles.
ast.target: 奥格赫发动三次攻击：一次使用其咬击，两次使用其触手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) piercing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 13) and restrained until the grapple ends. The otyugh has two tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8+3）钝击伤害加4（1d8）穿刺伤害。若目标为中型或更小体型，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 13）并束缚直至擒抱结束。奥格赫有两条触手，每条可擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owlbear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.
ast.target: 枭熊在依赖视觉或嗅觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.
ast.target: 枭熊发动两次攻击：一次使用其喙，一次使用其爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：10（1d10+5）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The panther has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 黑豹在依赖嗅觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the panther moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the panther can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若黑豹在同一直线上向一个生物移动至少20尺，并在同一回合内以爪击命中该目标，则该目标必须通过DC 12的力量豁免，否则被击倒。若目标倒地，黑豹可以使用附赠动作对其发动一次咬击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the spider can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.
ast.target: 作为附赠动作，蜘蛛可以魔法般地从物质位面转移到以太位面，反之亦然。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pit fiend has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 炼狱魔将在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pit fiend's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 炼狱魔的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The pit fiend's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 21). The pit fiend can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect magic, fireball
3/day each: hold monster, wall of fire
ast.target: 炼狱魔的施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 21）。炼狱魔可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：\n随意施放：侦测魔法、火球术\n每日各3次：怪物定身术、火墙术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pit fiend makes four attacks: one with its bite, one with its claw, one with its mace, and one with its tail.
ast.target: 炼狱魔发动四次攻击：一次使用其咬击，一次使用其爪击，一次使用其钉头锤，一次使用其尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft. , one target. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+14，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d8+8）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage plus 21 (6d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+14，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d6+8）钝击伤害加21（6d6）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10ft., one target. Hit: 24 (3d1O + 8) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+14，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：24（3d10+8）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar's weapon attacks are magical. When the planetar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 5d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 行星亚空的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。当行星亚空以任何武器命中时，该武器额外造成5d8点光耀伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar knows if it hears a lie.
ast.target: 行星亚空能辨别它听到的谎言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 行星亚空在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 行星亚空发动两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d6 + 7) slashing damage plus 22 (5d8) radiant damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：21（4d6+7）挥砍伤害加22（5d8）光耀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar touches another creature. The target magically regains 30 (6d8 + 3) hit points and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.
ast.target: 行星亚空触碰另一个生物。目标魔法般地恢复30（6d8+3）点生命值，并解除任何诅咒、疾病、中毒、目盲或耳聋状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The plesiosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.
ast.target: 蛇颈龙可以屏息1小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：14（3d6+4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 10的体质豁免，失败则受到5（2d4）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4+2）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pseudodragon has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight, hearing, or smell.
ast.target: 伪龙在依赖视觉、听觉或嗅觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pseudodragon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 伪龙在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pseudodragon can magically communicate simple ideas, emotions, and images telepathically with any creature within 100 ft. of it that can understand a language.
ast.target: 伪龙可以通过魔法与100尺内任何能理解语言的生物进行心灵感应，传递简单的想法、情绪和图像。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The worm can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.
ast.target: 掘地虫可以以一半的掘地速度在实心岩石中挖掘，并在其身后留下一条直径10尺的隧道。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The worm makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its stinger.
ast.target: 掘地虫发动两次攻击：一次使用其咬击，一次使用其尾刺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 19 (3d6 + 9) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10尺，单一生物。命中：19（3d6+9）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 19的体质豁免，失败则受到42（12d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quasit has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 夸格魔在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quasit magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Scare, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the quasit wears or carries is invisible with it.
ast.target: 夸格魔魔法般地隐形，直至其发动攻击或使用惊吓能力，或直至其专注结束（如同专注一个法术）。夸格魔穿戴或携带的任何装备也随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quipper has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 食人鱼在对任何未满生命值的生物进行近战攻击检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quipper can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 食人鱼只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rakshasa can't be affected or detected by spells of 6th level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saving throws against all other spells and magical effects.
ast.target: 罗刹妖不受6环或更低环法术的影响或探测，除非它愿意。它在对抗所有其他法术和魔法效应的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rakshasa makes two claw attacks
ast.target: 罗刹妖发动两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a person whispering, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.
ast.target: 渡鸦可以模仿它听过的一些简单声音，例如人的低语、婴儿的哭声或动物的唧唧声。听到这些声音的生物可以通过一次成功的DC 10感知（洞察）检定辨别出它们是模仿的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d10+4）穿刺伤害加3（1d6）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在一个15尺锥形区域内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 13的敏捷豁免，失败则受到24（7d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shark has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the shark's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若鲨鱼的盟友中至少有一个位于目标生物5尺内且该盟友未失能，则鲨鱼对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature that touches the remorhaz or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 任何触碰霜蜥蜴或在其5尺内以近战攻击命中它的生物，都会受到10（3d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 40 (6d10 + 7) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) fire damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the remorhaz can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+11，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：40（6d10+7）穿刺伤害加10（3d6）火焰伤害。若目标为生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 17）。在此擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，且霜蜥蜴无法咬击另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the rhinoceros moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 若犀牛在同一直线上向一个目标移动至少20尺，并在同一回合内以角顶攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到9（2d8）点钝击伤害。若目标为生物，则必须通过DC 15的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8+5）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roc has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 巨鹏在依赖视觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roc makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 巨鹏进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d8 + 9) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：27（4d8+9）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d6 + 9) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 19). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the roc can't use its talons on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：23（4d6+9）点挥砍伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC19）。在此擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，且巨鹏无法对其他目标使用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the roper remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal cave formation, such as a stalagmite.
ast.target: 当掠绳怪保持静止时，它与普通的洞穴构造（如石笋）无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 掠绳怪可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roper makes four attacks with its tendrils, uses Reel, and makes one attack with its bite.
ast.target: 掠绳怪用触手进行四次攻击，使用拖拽动作，然后用啃咬进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：22（4d8+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 50 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained and has disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, and the roper can't use the same tendril on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及50尺，单一生物。命中：目标被擒抱（逃脱DC15）。在此擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，力量检定和力量豁免具有劣势，且掠绳怪无法对其他目标使用同一根触手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roper pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 ft. straight toward it.
ast.target: 掠绳怪将每个被其擒抱的生物朝自己方向直线拖拽最多25尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rug is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the rug must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.
ast.target: 当毯处于反魔法力场区域内时，它失去行动能力。若被解除魔法针对，毯必须通过一次对抗施法者法术豁免DC的体质豁免，否则将昏迷1分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While it is grappling a creature, the rug takes only half the damage dealt to it, and the creature grappled by the rug takes the other half.
ast.target: 当毯正在擒抱一个生物时，它只承受所受伤害的一半，而被毯擒抱的生物承受另一半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the rug remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal rug.
ast.target: 当毯保持静止时，它与普通的毯子无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rust monster can pinpoint, by scent, the location of ferrous metal within 30 feet of it.
ast.target: 锈蚀怪可以通过嗅觉精准定位其30尺内含铁金属的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tiger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 老虎在依赖嗅觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the tiger moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the tiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果老虎在同一个回合内直线移动至少20尺朝向一个生物，然后用爪击命中该生物，该目标必须通过一次DC14的力量豁免，否则被击倒。如果目标处于倒地状态，老虎可以用附赠动作对其进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d10+5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6+5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人对任何生命值未满的生物进行的近战攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人可以在空气和水中呼吸，但它需要每4小时至少浸入水中一次以避免窒息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin can magically command any shark within 120 feet of it, using a limited telepathy.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人可以通过有限的心灵感应，魔法性地命令其120尺内的任何鲨鱼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin makes two melee attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or spear.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人进行两次近战攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击或长矛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4+1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4+1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺或射程20/60尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6+1）点穿刺伤害，或如果用双手进行近战攻击则为5（1d8+1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature that touches the salamander or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 任何在5尺内触碰火蜥蜴或用近战攻击命中它的生物会受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any metal melee weapon the salamander wields deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire damage on a hit (included in the attack).
ast.target: 火蜥蜴挥舞的任何金属近战武器在命中时额外造成3（1d6）点火焰伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The salamander makes two attacks: one with its spear and one with its tail.
ast.target: 火蜥蜴进行两次攻击：一次用长矛，一次用尾巴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20 ft./60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack, plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺或射程20尺/60尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点穿刺伤害，或如果用双手进行近战攻击则为13（2d8+4）点穿刺伤害，外加3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The satyr has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 萨特对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（2d4+1）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1 d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6+3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程80/320尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6+3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Gentle Lullaby. The creature falls asleep and is unconscious for 1 minute. The effect ends if the creature takes damage or if someone takes an action to shake the creature awake.
ast.target: 轻柔摇篮曲。生物陷入睡眠并昏迷1分钟。如果生物受到伤害或有人采取动作摇醒该生物，此效应结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 9 Constitution saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次DC9的体质豁免，失败则受到4（1d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The scout has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.
ast.target: 斥候在依赖听觉或视觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The scout makes two melee attacks or two ranged attacks.
ast.target: 斥候进行两次近战攻击或两次远程攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, ranged 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程150/600尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag targets one frightened creature she can see within 30 ft. of her. If the target can see the hag, it must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or drop to 0 hit points.
ast.target: 女巫选择一个她能看到的、在其30尺内且处于恐惧状态的生物。如果目标能看到女巫，它必须通过一次DC11的感知豁免来对抗此魔法，否则生命值降至0。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 幽影可以穿过窄至1英寸的空间而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in dim light or darkness, the shadow can take the Hide action as a bonus action. Its stealth bonus is also improved to +6.
ast.target: 在昏暗光线或黑暗中，幽影可以用附赠动作采取躲藏动作。它的隐匿加值也提升至+6。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the shadow has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.
ast.target: 在阳光下，幽影的攻击检定、属性检定和豁免具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever the shambling mound is subjected to lightning damage, it takes no damage and regains a number of hit points equal to the lightning damage dealt.
ast.target: 每当蔓生怪受到闪电伤害时，它不承受伤害，并恢复等同于所受闪电伤害值的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shambling mound makes two slam attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 14), and the shambling mound uses its Engulf on it.
ast.target: 蔓生怪进行两次猛击攻击。如果两次攻击都命中一个中型或更小的目标，该目标被擒抱（逃脱DC14），且蔓生怪对其使用吞噬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shield guardian regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit. point.
ast.target: 盾卫在其回合开始时，如果至少有1点生命值，则恢复10点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The guardian makes two fist attacks.
ast.target: 盾卫进行两次拳击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature makes an attack against the wearer of the guardian's amulet, the guardian grants a +2 bonus to the wearer's AC if the guardian is within 5 feet of the wearer.
ast.target: 当一个生物攻击佩戴盾卫护符的穿戴者时，如果盾卫在穿戴者5尺内，它会为穿戴者的护甲等级提供+2加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the shrieker remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.
ast.target: 当尖叫菇保持静止时，它与普通的真菌无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When bright light or a creature is within 30 feet of the shrieker, it emits a shriek audible within 300 feet of it. The shrieker continues to shriek until the disturbance moves out of range and for 1d4 of the shrieker's turns afterward
ast.target: 当强光或生物出现在尖叫菇30尺内时，它会发出一声尖叫，在其300尺范围内可闻。尖叫菇会持续尖叫，直到干扰源离开范围，并在其后持续尖叫1d4个尖叫菇的回合。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar's weapon attacks are magical. When the solar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 6d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 日耀使者的武器攻击是魔法性的。当日耀使者用任何武器命中时，该武器额外造成6d8点光耀伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar knows if it hears a lie.
ast.target: 太阳神能感知谎言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The solar's spell casting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 25). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect evil and good, invisibility (self only)
3/day each: blade barrier, dispel evil and good, resurrection
1/day each: commune, control weather
ast.target:
太阳神的施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 25）。它能天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意施放：侦测善恶、隐形术（仅限自身）
每日3次：剑刃护壁、解除善恶、死者复活
每日1次：通神、控制天气

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 太阳神在对抗法术及其他魔法效应的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar makes two greatsword attacks.
ast.target: 太阳神进行两次巨剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d6 + 8) slashing damage plus 27 (6d8) radiant damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+15，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：22（4d6 + 8）挥砍伤害加27（6d8）光耀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage plus 27 (6d8) radiant damage. If the target is a creature that has 190 hit points or fewer, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or die.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+13，射程150/600尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d8 + 6）穿刺伤害加27（6d8）光耀伤害。若目标为生命值不超过190的生物，其必须通过DC 15的体质豁免检定，否则死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar touches another creature. The target magically regains 40 (8d8 + 4) hit points and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.
ast.target: 太阳神触碰另一生物。目标神奇地恢复40（8d8 + 4）点生命值，并解除任何诅咒、疾病、中毒、目盲或耳聋状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 太阳神神奇地传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，至多120尺到其可见的未占据空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar emits magical, divine energy. Each creature of its choice in a 10 -foot radius must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage plus 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 太阳神散发出神奇的神圣能量。其选择的半径10尺内的每个生物必须进行DC 23的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到14（4d6）火焰伤害加14（4d6）光耀伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar targets one creature it can see within 30 ft. of it. If the target can see it, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until magic such as the lesser restoration spell removes the blindness.
ast.target: 太阳神以30尺内其可见的一个生物为目标。若目标能看见它，目标必须通过DC 15的体质豁免检定，否则陷入目盲状态，直到诸如次级复原术之类的法术解除该目盲。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 幽魂可以如同穿越困难地形般穿过其他生物和物体。若其回合结束时处于物体内，则受到5（1d10）力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the specter has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，幽魂的攻击检定以及依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 9 Constitution saving throw or take 2 (1d4) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 9的体质豁免检定，否则受到2（1d4）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 31 (7d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及10尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d6 + 4）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 13的体质豁免检定，失败则受到31（7d8）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：1点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sprite touches a creature and magically knows the creature's current emotional state. If the target fails a DC 10 Charisma saving throw, the sprite also knows the creature's alignment. Celestials, fiends, and undead automatically fail the saving throw.
ast.target: 小妖精触碰一个生物，并神奇地知晓该生物当前的情绪状态。若目标未通过DC 10的魅力豁免检定，小妖精还会知晓该生物的阵营。天界生物、邪魔和不死生物自动豁免失败。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sprite magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the sprite wears or carries is invisible with it.
ast.target: 小妖神奇地隐形，直到其攻击或施法，或直到其专注结束（如同专注一个法术）。小妖精穿戴或携带的任何装备也随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On each of its turns, the spy can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.
ast.target: 间谍在其每回合可以使用一个附赠动作进行疾走、脱离或躲藏动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The spy deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 ft. of an ally of the spy that isn't incapacitated and the spy doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.
ast.target: 当间谍以武器攻击命中目标且该攻击具有优势时，或当目标位于间谍未失能的盟友5尺内且间谍的攻击检定没有劣势时，间谍造成额外7（2d6）伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The spy makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 间谍进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程30/120尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a cloud of steam. Each creature within 5 ft. of the mephit must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or take 4 (1d8) fire damage.
ast.target: 当气元素死亡时，它会爆炸成一团蒸汽云。气元素5尺内的每个生物必须通过DC 10的敏捷豁免检定，否则受到4（1d8）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast blur, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 气元素能天生施放模糊术，无需材料成分。其天生施法属性为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 2 (1d4) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：2（1d4）挥砍伤害加2（1d4）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of scalding steam. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 气元素呼出一个15尺锥形的滚烫蒸汽。该区域内的每个生物必须通过DC 10的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到4（1d8）火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 巨人在岩石地形中进行的隐匿（敏捷）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：19（3d8 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc

The giant's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect magic, feather fall, levitate, light

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant hurls a magical lightning bolt at a point it can see within 500 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨人向其500尺内可见的一点投掷一道魔法闪电。该点10尺内的每个生物必须进行DC 17的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到54（12d8）闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fiend ignores the range restriction on its telepathy when communicating with a creature it has charmed. The two don't even need to be on the same plane of existence.

ast.target: 邪魔神奇地从物质位面进入以太位面，反之亦然。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm can't use its blindsight while deafened.

ast.target: 蜂群依赖听觉的感知（察觉）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny bat. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes five attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, one with its horns, and one with its tai l. It can use its Swallow instead of its bite.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克可以使用其威严存在。然后它进行五次攻击：一次啃咬，两次爪击，一次角顶和一次尾击。它可以使用其吞噬代替啃咬。

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+19，触及10尺，一个目标。命中：36（4d12 + 10）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 20）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，且塔拉斯克无法啃咬另一个目标。

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The thug has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the thug's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

ast.source: If the tiger moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the tiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the treant remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.
ast.target: 当树人保持静止时，它与普通树木无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.
ast.target: 树人对物体和建筑造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The treant makes two slam attacks.
ast.target: 树人进行两次猛击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：16（3d6 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc

If the target is prone, the triceratops can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果三角龙向一个生物直线移动至少20尺，并在同一回合内用角顶攻击命中该目标，则该目标必须通过DC 13的力量豁免，否则被击倒。如果目标倒地，三角龙可以用一个附赠动作对其进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
