ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，一个倒地的生物。命中：22（3d10 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The troll has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 巨魔在依赖嗅觉的感知检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.
ast.target: 巨魔在其回合开始时恢复10点生命值。如果巨魔受到强酸或火焰伤害，则此特性在其下一回合开始时不起作用。巨魔仅在其回合开始时生命值为0且未再生时才会死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The troll makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 巨魔进行三次攻击：一次啃咬和两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：7（1d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tyrannosaurus makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail. It can't make both attacks against the same target.
ast.target: 霸王龙进行两次攻击：一次啃咬和一次尾击。它不能对同一目标进行两次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 33 (4d12 + 7) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the tyrannosaurus can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，一个目标。命中：33（4d12 + 7）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是中型或更小的生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 17）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，且霸王龙无法啃咬另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，一个目标。命中：20（3d8 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the unicorn moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a horn attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果独角兽向一个目标直线移动至少20尺，并在同一回合内用角攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到9（2d8）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须通过DC 15的力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The unicorn's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). The unicorn can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:

At will: detect evil and good, druidcraft, pass without trace
1/day each: calm emotions, dispel evil and good, entangle
ast.target:
独角兽的天生施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 14）。独角兽可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意施放：侦测善恶，德鲁伊伎俩，无踪潜行
每日各1次：安抚情绪，解除善恶，纠缠术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 独角兽对法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 独角兽的武器攻击视为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn makes two attacks: one with its hooves and one with its horn.
ast.target: 独角兽进行两次攻击：一次蹄击和一次角顶。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn touches another creature with its horn. The target magically regains 11 (2d8 + 2) hit points. In addition, the touch removes all diseases and neutralizes all poisons afflicting the target.
ast.target: 独角兽用角触碰另一个生物。目标神奇地恢复11（2d8 + 2）点生命值。此外，该触碰能移除目标的所有疾病并中和所有影响目标的毒素。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn magically teleports itself and up to three willing creatures it can see within 5 ft. of it, along with any equipment they are wearing or carrying, to a location the unicorn is familiar with, up to 1 mile away.
ast.target: 独角兽神奇地将自己以及最多三个它能看到的、位于其5尺内的自愿生物，连同他们穿戴或携带的任何装备，传送到独角兽熟悉的一个地点，距离不超过1英里。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn makes one attack with its hooves.
ast.target: 独角兽进行一次蹄击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn creates a shimmering, magical field around itself or another creature it can see within 60 ft. of it. The target gains a +2 bonus to AC until the end of the unicorn's next turn.
ast.target: 独角兽在自身周围或它能看到的60尺内的另一个生物周围创造一个闪烁的魔法力场。目标获得+2的护甲加值，直到独角兽的下一回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn magically regains 11 (2d8 + 2) hit points.
ast.target: 独角兽神奇地恢复11（2d8 + 2）点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 如果吸血鬼在一次豁免检定中失败，它可以选择改为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.
ast.target: 如果吸血鬼拥有至少1点生命值，且未处于阳光或流水中，则在其回合开始时恢复20点生命值。如果吸血鬼受到光耀伤害或圣水伤害，此特性在其下一回合开始时失效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 吸血鬼可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.
ast.target: 吸血鬼发动两次攻击，其中只有一次可以是啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vampire can grapple the target (escape DC 18).
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：8（1d8+4）钝击伤害。吸血鬼可以选择改为擒抱目标（逃脱DC 18）而非造成伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 吸血鬼移动至多等同于其速度的距离，且不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire makes one unarmed strike.
ast.target: 吸血鬼发动一次徒手打击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire makes one bite attack.
ast.target: 吸血鬼发动一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.
ast.target: 如果吸血鬼拥有至少1点生命值，且未处于阳光或流水中，则在其回合开始时恢复10点生命值。如果吸血鬼受到光耀伤害或圣水伤害，此特性在其下一回合开始时失效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vampire can grapple the target (escape DC 13).
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：8（2d4+3）挥砍伤害。吸血鬼可以选择改为擒抱目标（逃脱DC 13）而非造成伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8+3）挥砍伤害，或如果双手使用则为8（1d10+3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the violet fungus remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary fungus.
ast.target: 当紫色真菌保持静止时，它与普通真菌无法区分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fungus makes 1d4 Rotting Touch attacks.
ast.target: 真菌发动1d4次腐烂之触攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d8) necrotic damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及10尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d8）黯蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vrock has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 弗洛克在对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vrock makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 弗洛克发动两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d10+3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vrock emits a horrific screech. Each creature within 20 feet of it that can hear it and that isn't a demon must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of the vrock's next turn .
ast.target: 弗洛克发出一声恐怖的尖叫。其周围20尺内能听到此声音且非恶魔的生物，必须成功通过一次DC 14的体质豁免检定，否则将被震慑直至弗洛克的下一回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the horse moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a hooves attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the horse can make another attack with its hooves against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果战马直线移动至少20尺冲向一个生物，并在同一回合内用蹄击命中该目标，则该目标必须成功通过一次DC 14的力量豁免检定，否则将被击倒。如果目标已倒地，战马可以用附赠动作对其再发动一次蹄击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elemental takes cold damage, it partially freezes; its speed is reduced by 20 ft. until the end of its next turn.
ast.target: 如果元素生物受到冷冻伤害，它会部分冻结；其速度降低20尺，直至其下一回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werebear has advantage on WisGlom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 熊人在依赖嗅觉的感知检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: In bear form, the werebear makes two claw attacks. In humanoid form, it makes two greataxe attacks. In hybrid form, it can attack like a bear or a humanoid.
ast.target: 在熊形态下，熊人发动两次爪击。在人形形态下，它发动两次巨斧攻击。在混合形态下，它可以像熊或人形生物一样攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with were bear lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10+4）穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 14的体质豁免检定，否则将被诅咒患上熊人狼化症。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d12+4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wereboar can use its action to polymorph into a boar-humanoid hybrid or into a boar, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 野猪人可以使用其动作变形为野猪-类人生物混合体或野猪，或变回其真实形态（类人生物）。其属性（护甲值除外）在每种形态下都相同。它穿戴或携带的任何装备不会被转化。如果它死亡，将变回真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the wereboar moves at least 15 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with its tusks on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果野猪人直线移动至少15尺冲向一个目标，并在同一回合内用獠牙命中该目标，则该目标受到额外7（2d6）点挥砍伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 13的力量豁免检定，否则将被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the wereboar takes 14 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 如果野猪人受到14点或更少的伤害，且该伤害会使其生命值降至0，则其生命值改为降至1点。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wereboar makes two attacks, only one of which can be with its tusks.
ast.target: 野猪人发动两次攻击，其中只有一次可以是獠牙攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6+3）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with wereboar lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6+3）挥砍伤害。如果目标是类人生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 12的体质豁免检定，否则将被诅咒患上野猪人狼化症。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wererat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 鼠人在依赖嗅觉的感知检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wererat makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite.
ast.target: 鼠人发动两次攻击，其中只有一次可以是啃咬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with wererat lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4+2）穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 11的体质豁免检定，否则将被诅咒患上鼠人狼化症。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The weretiger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 虎人在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the weretiger moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the weretiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果虎人直线移动至少15尺冲向一个生物，并在同一回合内用爪击命中该目标，则该目标必须成功通过一次DC 14的力量豁免检定，否则将被击倒。如果目标已倒地，虎人可以用附赠动作对其发动一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: In humanoid form, the weretiger makes two scimitar attacks or two longbow attacks. In hybrid form, it can attack like a humanoid or make two claw attacks.
ast.target: 在人形形态下，虎人发动两次弯刀攻击或两次长弓攻击。在混合形态下，它可以像人形生物一样攻击，或发动两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with weretiger lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d10+3）穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 13的体质豁免检定，否则将被诅咒患上虎人狼化症。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werewolf can use its action to polymorph into a wolf-humanoid hybrid or into a wolf, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 狼人可以使用其动作变形为狼-类人生物混合体或狼，或变回其真实形态（类人生物）。其属性（护甲值除外）在每种形态下都相同。它穿戴或携带的任何装备不会被转化。如果它死亡，将变回真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werewolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 狼人在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知检定中具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werewolf makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or spear.
ast.target: 狼人发动两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击或长矛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with werewolf lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8+2）穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 12的体质豁免检定，否则将被诅咒患上狼人狼化症。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：7（2d4+2）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺或射程20/60尺，单一生物。命中：5（1d6+2）穿刺伤害，或如果双手用于近战攻击则为6（1d8+2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10+2）穿刺伤害外加2（1d4）点冷冻伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales an icy blast of hail in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在一个15尺锥形区域内喷出一股冰冷的冰雹。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12的体质豁免检定，失败则受到22（5d8）点冷冻伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the wight has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，尸妖的攻击检定具有劣势，依赖视觉的感知检定也同样具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wight makes two longsword attacks or two longbow attacks. It can use its Life Drain in place of one longsword attack.
ast.target: 尸妖发动两次长剑攻击或两次长弓攻击。它可以将生命吸取替换为一次长剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage, or 7 (1d10 + 2) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8+2）挥砍伤害，或如果双手使用则为7（1d10+2）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the will-o'-wisp can target one creature it can see within 5 ft. of it that has 0 hit points and is still alive. The target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw against this magic or die. If the target dies, the will-o'-wisp regains 10 (3d6) hit points.
ast.target: 作为附赠动作，鬼火可以指定其周围5尺内一个它能看到、生命值为0且仍存活的生物。该目标必须成功通过一次DC 10的体质豁免检定对抗此魔法，否则死亡。如果目标死亡，鬼火恢复10（3d6）点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp can't wear or carry anything.
ast.target: 鬼火无法穿戴或携带任何物品。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 鬼火可以如同穿越困难地形般穿过其他生物和物体。如果它在物体内部结束回合，将受到5（1d10）点力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp sheds bright light in a 5- to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of ft. equal to the chosen radius. The will-o'-wisp can alter the radius as a bonus action.
ast.target: 鬼火在5至20英尺半径内发出明亮光线，并在所选半径之外额外发出等同于该半径英尺数的微弱光线。鬼火可以使用一个附赠动作来改变半径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d8) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，一个生物。命中：9（2d8）点闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp and its light magically become invisible until it attacks or uses its Consume Life, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell).
ast.target: 鬼火及其光芒会魔法般地隐形，直到它发动攻击或使用其吞噬生命能力，或者直到其专注结束（如同专注于一个法术）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.
ast.target: 狼在雪地地形中进行躲藏时，其敏捷（隐匿）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：11（2d6+4）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 14的力量豁免检定，否则将被击倒在地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf exhales a blast of freezing wind in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 狼在一个15英尺锥形区域内喷出一股寒风。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到18（4d8）点寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：7（2d4+2）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须成功通过一次DC 11的力量豁免检定，否则将被击倒在地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The worg has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 座狼依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 幽魂可以如同穿越困难地形般穿过其他生物和物体。如果它在物体内部结束回合，将受到5（1d10）点力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the wraith has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下时，幽魂的攻击检定以及依赖视觉的感知检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wyvern makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its stinger. While flying, it can use its claws in place of one other attack.
ast.target: 飞龙进行两次攻击：一次使用其啮咬，一次使用其尾刺。飞行时，它可以使用其爪击代替一次其他攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10英尺，一个生物。命中：11（2d6+4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10英尺，一个生物。命中：11（2d6+4）点穿刺伤害。目标必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免检定，失败则受到24（7d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the xorn doesn't disturb the material it moves through.
ast.target: 土巨怪可以挖掘穿过非魔法的、未加工的泥土和石头。挖掘时，土巨怪不会扰动它穿过的材料。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 土巨怪在岩石地形中进行躲藏时，其敏捷（隐匿）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn can pinpoint, by scent, the location of precious metals and stones, such as coins and gems, within 60 ft. of it.
ast.target: 土巨怪可以通过气味，在60英尺范围内精确定位贵金属和宝石（如硬币和宝石）的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn makes three claw attacks and one bite attack.
ast.target: 土巨怪进行三次爪击和一次啮咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：13（3d6+3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：6（1d6+3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 龙进行三次攻击：一次使用其啮咬，两次使用其爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10英尺，一个目标。命中：15（2d10+4）点穿刺伤害加4（1d8）点强酸伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 49 (11d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙喷吐一道30英尺长、5英尺宽的酸液线。该线上的每个生物必须进行一次DC 14的敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到49（11d8）点强酸伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9命中，触及10英尺，一个目标。命中：16（2d10+5）点穿刺伤害加5（1d10）点闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales poisonous gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙在一个30英尺锥形区域内喷吐毒气。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 14的体质豁免检定，失败则受到42（12d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales an icy blast in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙在一个30英尺锥形区域内喷吐寒冰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免检定，失败则受到45（10d8）点寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: text
ast.source: parameters. Dice callbacks should return an array of strings and objects, with the objects defining the dice rolls:
ast.target: 参数。骰子回调函数应返回一个由字符串和对象组成的数组，其中对象定义了骰子掷骰：

ast.target: 返回怪物名称

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please Note: This will not run if a dice callback is provided.
ast.target: 请注意：如果提供了骰子回调函数，此功能将不会运行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The block will run the callback on each save object and use the returned object as the save.
ast.target: 该代码块将对每个豁免对象运行回调函数，并使用返回的对象作为豁免值。

ast.name: text
ast.source: parameters. The callback should return an object with a single key and value. For example:
ast.target: 参数。回调函数应返回一个包含单个键值对的对象。例如：

ast.target: return {\"fort\": property.fortitude}

ast.target: 骰子解析器回调函数需要解析正则表达式的结果，并返回正确的骰子字符串以供显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The callback will have the
ast.target: 回调函数将拥有

ast.target: 回调函数应返回以下实例之一：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add
ast.target: 添加

ast.name: text
ast.source: regular expressions
ast.target: 正则表达式

ast.name: text
ast.source: to detect dice rolls inside your layout.
ast.target: 以检测布局中的骰子掷骰。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These are parsed in order, and the first one to trigger is what will be used.
ast.target: 这些正则表达式将按顺序解析，第一个触发的将被使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set Sources
ast.target: 设置来源

ast.name: text
ast.source: Fantasy Statblocks Settings
ast.target: Fantasy Statblocks 设置

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will cause to plugin to save data to a temporary file before saving the actual data file in an attempt to prevent data loss.
ast.target: 此功能将使插件在保存实际数据文件前，先将数据保存到临时文件，以尝试防止数据丢失。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This can cause issues sometimes when using sync services.
ast.target: 使用同步服务时，这有时可能会导致问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This setting is currently disabled.
ast.target: 此设置当前已禁用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add Dice Roller dice to statblocks by default. Use
ast.target: 默认将骰子滚动器的骰子添加到属性块中。使用

ast.name: text
ast.source: dice: false
ast.target: 骰子：否

ast.name: text
ast.source: to disable per-statblock.
ast.target: 可针对单个属性块禁用此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This setting is only usable with the Dice Roller plugin enabled.
ast.target: 此设置仅在启用骰子滚动器插件时可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Roll graphical dice inside statblocks by default. Use
ast.target: 默认在属性块内滚动图形化骰子。使用

ast.name: text
ast.source: render: false
ast.target: 渲染：否

ast.name: text
ast.source: The plugin will attempt to detect wikilinks inside Statblocks.
ast.target: 插件将尝试检测属性块内的维基链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please note: these links will not be added to the graph.
ast.target: 请注意：这些链接不会被添加到关系图谱中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition System Reference Document monsters.
ast.target: 使用《龙与地下城》第五版系统参考文档中的怪物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The plugin will watch the vault for creatures defined in note frontmatter.
ast.target: 插件将监视保险库中通过笔记前置信息定义的生物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The "Parse Frontmatter for Creatures" command can also be used.
ast.target: 也可以使用“解析生物的前置信息”命令。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Debug messages will be displayed by the file parser.
ast.target: 文件解析器将显示调试信息。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 可以在此处创建和管理新的属性块布局。可以使用

ast.name: text

ast.target: 导入通用 JSON 文件。JSON 对象将被导入

ast.target: 且所有对象必须具有

ast.target: 属性。

ast.target: 创建布局

ast.name: text

ast.target: 此布局包含 JavaScript 代码块。JavaScript 代码块可以在您的保险库中执行代码，这可能导致数据丢失或损坏。

ast.name: text

ast.target: 您确定要导入此布局吗？

ast.target: 导入且不再询问
